sensors.name: Hyperview Tests
sensors.description: Run the Hyperview test suite (11 tests, hv app)
sensors.command: docker compose exec web python manage.py test hv

sensors.name: Hyperview Tests (Verbose)
sensors.description: Run Hyperview tests with verbose output
sensors.command: docker compose exec web python manage.py test hv --verbosity=2

sensors.name: Django System Check
sensors.description: Run Django system checks for configuration issues
sensors.command: docker compose exec web python manage.py check

sensors.name: Django Deploy Check
sensors.command: docker compose exec web python manage.py check --deploy

sensors.name: Migrations Status
sensors.command: docker compose exec web python manage.py showmigrations

sensors.name: Validate HXML Output
sensors.description: Verify all Hyperview endpoints return valid XML
sensors.command:
docker compose exec web python -c "
from django.test import Client
c = Client()
endpoints = ['/hyperview/', '/hyperview/home/', '/hyperview/list/', '/hyperview/list/items/', '/hyperview/detail/1/', '/hyperview/form/', '/hyperview/login/', '/hyperview/profile/', '/hyperview/settings/', '/hyperview/about/']
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
for ep in endpoints:
    resp = c.get(ep)
    try:
        ET.fromstring(resp.content)
        print(f'OK: {ep} ({resp.status_code})')
    except ET.ParseError as e:
        print(f'FAIL: {ep} - {e}')
"

sensors.name: Docker Services Status
sensors.description: Check if all Docker services are running

sensors.name: Web Service Logs
sensors.description: View recent Django web service logs

sensors.name: Database Healthcheck
sensors.description: Check PostgreSQL connectivity from web container
sensors.command: docker compose exec web python -c "import os; os.environ['DB_ENGINE']='postgresql'; import django; import os; os.environ.setdefault('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE', 'core.settings'); django.setup(); from django.db import connection; connection.ensure_connection(); print('DB OK')"

sensors.name: Dependencies Check
sensors.description: Verify uv lock file is in sync with pyproject.toml

sensors.name: Static Files Check
sensors.description: Collect static files (dry-run to check for issues)
sensors.command: docker compose exec web python manage.py collectstatic --dry-run --noinput
